scripts.dev: concurrently -n img-srv,aud-srv,img-gen,txt-gen,aud-gen,client,game -c blue,gray,magenta,yellow,red,green,cyan "pnpm -C image_server dev" "pnpm -C audio_server dev" "pnpm -C image_gen dev" "pnpm -C text_gen dev" "pnpm -C audio_gen dev" "pnpm -C client dev" "pnpm -C game dev"
scripts.dev:servers: concurrently -n img-srv,aud-srv,img-gen,txt-gen,aud-gen -c blue,gray,magenta,yellow,red "pnpm -C image_server dev" "pnpm -C audio_server dev" "pnpm -C image_gen dev" "pnpm -C text_gen dev" "pnpm -C audio_gen dev"
scripts.dev:front: concurrently -n client,game -c green,cyan "pnpm -C client dev" "pnpm -C game dev"
scripts.install:all: for d in gen_shared story_core image_server audio_server image_gen text_gen audio_gen client game; do echo "== $d =="; pnpm -C "$d" install || exit 1; done
